channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: All Aboard Hantavirus-Hit Ship 'High-Risk Contact', Must Be Monitored: WHO

media:content.media:description: WHO chief Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus is heading to Tenerife to help coordinate the evacuation.

item.description: There are nearly 150 people on board the MV Hondius at the centre of the outbreak that has killed three people, which is heading towards the waters off Tenerife.
item.content:encoded: There are nearly 150 people on board the MV Hondius at the centre of the outbreak that has killed three people, which is heading towards the waters off Tenerife.

item.title: Indian Sailor Dies, 4 Injured After Boat Catches Fire, Sinks Near Hormuz

media:content.media:description: The exact cause of the fire is yet to be ascertained. (Representational)

item.description: The boat was carrying 18 Indian crew members - who were rescued by a vessel that was passing by.
item.content:encoded: The boat was carrying 18 Indian crew members - who were rescued by a vessel that was passing by.

item.title: Handguns Could Soon Be Mailed In The US For First Time In 100 Years

media:content.media:description: USPS proposes allowing mailing of unloaded handguns under new firearms standards.

item.description: New USPS rule could permit shipping handguns securely within states and with restrictions across states.
item.content:encoded: New USPS rule could permit shipping handguns securely within states and with restrictions across states.

item.title: All About Turkey's New 'Yldrmhan' Missile That Can 'Hit' US Mainland

media:content.media:description: Turkey's longest-range missile is currently the Tayfun, which has reached 600 km in tests

item.description: The missile was introduced at the SAHA 2026 Defence and Aerospace Exhibition, but defence experts remain unconvinced about its claimed capabilities.
item.content:encoded: The missile was introduced at the SAHA 2026 Defence and Aerospace Exhibition, but defence experts remain unconvinced about its claimed capabilities.

item.title: Hantavirus Outbreak: Indian Expert Shares WHO Protocols, Response Times For Infectious Disease Outbreaks
item.description: As the MV Hondius hantavirus outbreak triggered a multinational response, global health expert Dr Sabine Kapasi explains how WHO protocols, maritime surveillance and international coordination work during infectious disease emergencies.
item.content:encoded: As the MV Hondius hantavirus outbreak triggered a multinational response, global health expert Dr Sabine Kapasi explains how WHO protocols, maritime surveillance and international coordination work during infectious disease emergencies.

item.title: Powerful Iranian Ultra-Hardliners Mobilise Against Iran-US Nuclear Talks

media:content.media:description: The faction's rise has become more visible after the death of former Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei

item.description: The group known as “Jebhe-ye Paydari” and described as “Super Revolutionaries,” has emerged as one of the loudest opponents of any agreement with Washington.
item.content:encoded: The group known as “Jebhe-ye Paydari” and described as “Super Revolutionaries,” has emerged as one of the loudest opponents of any agreement with Washington.

item.title: "Outbreak Can Be Contained": Dr Soumya Swaminathan On Hantavirus Crisis
item.description: Dr. Swaminathan emphasised Hantavirus' limited transmissibility despite human-to-human spread. She also speaks about the Andes strain, the only known hantavirus variant capable of person-to-person transmission.
item.content:encoded: Dr. Swaminathan emphasised Hantavirus' limited transmissibility despite human-to-human spread. She also speaks about the Andes strain, the only known hantavirus variant capable of person-to-person transmission.

item.title: Pak General's 'Why English?' Jab At Indian Army Backfires Into Meme Fest

media:content.media:description: The Indian briefing focused on the military and strategic outcomes of Operation Sindoor.

item.description: Operation Sindoor was launched last year after the Pahalgam terror attack in which 26 people were killed.
item.content:encoded: Operation Sindoor was launched last year after the Pahalgam terror attack in which 26 people were killed.

item.title: 'Oh My God, They Died': Chilling Video Shows Moment Mount Dukono Erupts On Hikers

media:content.media:description: The viral clip showed the moment the volcano erupted.

item.description: Three hikers - including two foreigners and a local resident - have died after Indonesia's Mount Dukono volcano erupted.
item.content:encoded: Three hikers - including two foreigners and a local resident - have died after Indonesia's Mount Dukono volcano erupted.

item.title: What Is Hantavirus? This Is Where It Got Its Name From
item.description: Symptoms of Hantavirus generally appear in two phases. The early stage resembles a common viral illness and may include fever, fatigue, muscle aches, headache, dizziness, and chills.
item.content:encoded: Symptoms of Hantavirus generally appear in two phases. The early stage resembles a common viral illness and may include fever, fatigue, muscle aches, headache, dizziness, and chills.

item.title: North Korea Adopts Policy For Nuclear Strike If Kim Jong Un Is Killed: Report

media:content.media:description: Kim Jong-un is also known for strict security measures.

item.description: The move comes months after top Iranian leaders, including Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei and several senior advisers, were assassinated by US and Israeli military operations.
item.content:encoded: The move comes months after top Iranian leaders, including Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei and several senior advisers, were assassinated by US and Israeli military operations.

item.title: Hantavirus Cruise Ship Passengers To Evacuate At Canary Islands Soon: WHO Shares Screening, Contact Tracing Plans
item.description: The World Health Organization (WHO) is closely monitoring the hantavirus outbreak, with eight cases reported so far, including confirmed and suspected infections.
item.content:encoded: The World Health Organization (WHO) is closely monitoring the hantavirus outbreak, with eight cases reported so far, including confirmed and suspected infections.

item.title: 4-Year-Old Boy In China Survives 11th-Floor Fall After Climbing Window To Look For Mother
item.description: Xiaoming's parents said they believe their son will fully recover. They added that it is a miracle that their boy survived.
item.content:encoded: Xiaoming's parents said they believe their son will fully recover. They added that it is a miracle that their boy survived.

item.title: Hantavirus vs Bird Flu: Which Viral Infection Spreads Faster To Humans?

media:content.media:description: Hantavirus and bird flu are viral infections that can transmit to humans

item.description: Hantavirus and bird flu are viral infections that can spread to humans under certain conditions. Here is what the WHO says about the transmission patterns for each and why you need to practise necessary precautions to be safe.
item.content:encoded: Hantavirus and bird flu are viral infections that can spread to humans under certain conditions. Here is what the WHO says about the transmission patterns for each and why you need to practise necessary precautions to be safe.

item.title: Britain's First Openly Gay Surrogate Father Charged With Rape And Human Trafficking

media:content.media:description: Barrie Drewitt-Barlow and his husband Scott took over Maldon and Tiptree FC in 2025

item.description: Barrie Drewitt-Barlow, known as one of Britain's first openly gay fathers through surrogacy, has been charged alongside Scott Hutchinson with rape, sexual assault and human trafficking offences in the UK.
item.content:encoded: Barrie Drewitt-Barlow, known as one of Britain's first openly gay fathers through surrogacy, has been charged alongside Scott Hutchinson with rape, sexual assault and human trafficking offences in the UK.

item.title: Bright Lights, Hot Orbs: New UFO Files Detail Sightings, Leave Questions Unanswered

media:content.media:description: Among the files are hundreds of pages detailing reported sightings dating to the 1940s.

item.description: The documents include more than 20 video files showing unidentified objects captured by military sensors in locations from Syria and Japan to North America
item.content:encoded: The documents include more than 20 video files showing unidentified objects captured by military sensors in locations from Syria and Japan to North America

item.title: Trump Focuses On Reopening Hormuz, Puts Iran Nuclear Talks On Hold

media:content.media:description: Trump has said eliminating Iran's nuclear programme is main justification for conflict in Middle East

item.description: Supporters of Trump's war point to Iran's decimated navy and air force as evidence the conflict has weakened Washington's geopolitical foe.
item.content:encoded: Supporters of Trump's war point to Iran's decimated navy and air force as evidence the conflict has weakened Washington's geopolitical foe.

item.title: Mexico Announces Early End To School Year Citing World Cup Preparations

media:content.media:description: The tournament, hosted jointly by Mexico, US and Canada, kicks off on June 11

item.description: Education Secretary Mario Delgado said the decision to end the school year 40 days early was made in part due to a heat wave impacting several states.
item.content:encoded: Education Secretary Mario Delgado said the decision to end the school year 40 days early was made in part due to a heat wave impacting several states.

item.title: American Passengers On Hantavirus-Hit Cruise Ship To Quarantine In Nebraska: Report
item.description: Washington, May 9 (IANS) American passengers aboard the cruise ship at the centre of a hantavirus outbreak will be quarantined in Nebraska upon arrival in the United States, local media reported, citing an official from the US Centres for Disease Con
item.content:encoded: Washington, May 9 (IANS) American passengers aboard the cruise ship at the centre of a hantavirus outbreak will be quarantined in Nebraska upon arrival in the United States, local media reported, citing an official from the US Centres for Disease Con

item.title: Hantavirus Update: WHO Chief, Spanish Health Authorities To Coordinate Ship Evacuation In Canary Islands
item.description: The World Health Organization's chief is due in the Spanish island of Tenerife on Saturday to help coordinate the evacuation of passengers hit by the...
item.content:encoded: The World Health Organization's chief is due in the Spanish island of Tenerife on Saturday to help coordinate the evacuation of passengers hit by the...
